persona.name: Sarah
persona.greeting: Hello, thank you for calling TeleCorp UK. My name is Sarah, how can I help you today?
persona.greeting_returning: Hello {customer_name}, welcome back to TeleCorp UK. I can see you're on our {plan_name} plan. How can I help you today?
persona.hold_message: I just need to check a few things for you, please bear with me for a moment.
persona.transfer_message: I'm going to transfer you to our specialist team who will be able to help you further. Please hold.
persona.sign_off: Is there anything else I can help you with today? Thank you for calling TeleCorp UK. Have a great day!
persona.escalation_handoff: I completely understand your frustration and I want to make sure this gets resolved properly. I'm going to connect you with my senior colleague right now.

plans.name: SIM Only Monthly
plans.best_for: Customers who want flexibility without a long-term commitment

plans.name: SIM Only Annual
plans.best_for: Personal users looking for great value with moderate data needs

plans.name: Broadband Basic
plans.best_for: Small households with basic browsing and streaming needs

plans.name: Broadband Pro
plans.best_for: Families and home workers needing fast, reliable connectivity

plans.name: Business Mobile
plans.best_for: Business professionals who need reliable unlimited connectivity

plans.name: Enterprise Bundle
plans.best_for: Growing businesses needing complete connectivity solutions

resolution_steps: 1. Verify customer identity using security questions
2. Pull up the last 3 invoices and identify the disputed charge
3. Check if the charge is valid (roaming, premium SMS, data overage)
4. If valid, explain the charge clearly with dates and usage
5. If error confirmed, process refund within 3-5 business days
6. Apply goodwill credit of £5, if customer remains unhappy
sample_customer_phrases: I've been charged twice for my monthly bill
There's a £50 charge on my bill I don't recognise
Why is my bill so high this month?
I need a refund for this incorrect charge
You've taken too much money from my account

resolution_steps: 1. Confirm customer's postcode to check local network status
2. Check internal outage dashboard for known issues
3. If outage confirmed, provide estimated fix time and apologise
4. If no outage, guide customer through device troubleshooting
5. Offer to send network refresh signal to SIM
6. If issue persists, log a network ticket with priority flag
sample_customer_phrases: I've had no signal for two days
My phone shows no service at home
Is there an outage in my area?
The network keeps dropping out
I can't make any calls or use data

resolution_steps: 1. Review customer's current plan and usage patterns
2. Identify if they're consistently exceeding limits
3. Present 2-3 suitable upgrade options with clear pricing
4. Highlight the value and savings of annual commitment
5. Process upgrade with immediate effect or next billing cycle
6. Confirm new charges and send updated contract via email
sample_customer_phrases: I keep running out of data, can I upgrade?
What's your best unlimited data plan?
I want to move to a faster broadband package
Can I get more minutes on my plan?
I'm interested in upgrading to business mobile

resolution_steps: 1. Understand the reason for wanting to downgrade
2. Check current usage to see if downgrade makes sense
3. Offer a retention deal before processing downgrade
4. If retention declined, present suitable lower-tier options
5. Explain any contract implications or early termination
6. Process downgrade for next billing cycle
sample_customer_phrases: I want to move to a cheaper plan
Can I reduce my package to save money?
I don't need all this data anymore
What's your cheapest option?
I need to cut my phone bill down

resolution_steps: 1. Express genuine concern and ask why they want to leave
2. Listen actively and acknowledge their frustration
3. Check eligibility for retention offers in the system
4. Present the best available retention deal immediately
5. If declined, process PAC code request (takes 24 hours)
6. Log churn reason for product feedback
sample_customer_phrases: I want to cancel my contract
I'm switching to Vodafone, they're cheaper
Can I have my PAC code please?
I've had enough, I'm leaving TeleCorp
How do I cancel my account?

resolution_steps: 1. Verify customer identity with enhanced security
2. State the outstanding balance clearly and calmly
3. Ask if they're able to pay the full amount today
4. If not, offer a payment plan (up to 3 instalments)
5. Process payment or set up Direct Debit for plan
6. Confirm reconnection within 2 hours if applicable
sample_customer_phrases: I got a letter saying I owe money
My service has been suspended, how do I pay?
Can I set up a payment plan for my bill?
How much do I owe you?
I want to pay off my outstanding balance

resolution_steps: 1. Identify the specific technical issue clearly
2. Confirm device make, model, and software version
3. Guide through basic troubleshooting (restart, SIM reseat)
4. Send correct APN/MMS settings if data issue
5. If unresolved, book engineer visit or arrange replacement
6. Create technical support ticket for follow-up
sample_customer_phrases: My internet is really slow
I can't get my emails to work
How do I set up my voicemail?
My phone isn't receiving picture messages
The router keeps disconnecting

resolution_steps: 1. Confirm if customer is porting IN or porting OUT
2. For port OUT: Generate PAC code (valid 30 days)
3. For port IN: Collect PAC code and verify number
4. Explain that porting takes 1-2 business days
5. Warn that old service will terminate on port completion
6. Send confirmation SMS with porting reference
sample_customer_phrases: I want to keep my old number
Can I port my number to TeleCorp?
I need a PAC code to leave
How long does number transfer take?
I want to bring my number from Vodafone

resolution_steps: 1. Verify customer identity with enhanced security (SIM fraud risk)
2. Confirm reason for SIM swap (lost/stolen/damaged/upgrade)
3. If stolen, offer to suspend account immediately
4. Order replacement SIM (free) or activate eSIM
5. New SIM arrives in 2-3 business days by post
6. Old SIM will be deactivated when new one is activated
sample_customer_phrases: I've lost my phone and need a new SIM
My SIM card is damaged
Can I switch to an eSIM?
I need a replacement SIM card
My phone was stolen, I need to block the SIM

resolution_steps: 1. Identify which country the customer is travelling to
2. Check if destination is in EU (included) or rest of world
3. Explain roaming rates for the specific destination
4. Offer travel data add-on if beneficial
5. Remind to turn off data roaming if not using add-on
6. Send roaming guide via SMS
sample_customer_phrases: I'm going to Spain, will my phone work?
How much does data cost in America?
Do you have any travel packages?
Will I be charged extra in Europe?
Can I use my data allowance abroad?

resolution_steps: 1. Verify customer identity
2. Identify what information they need
3. Provide current balance, usage, or billing date as requested
4. Process any account detail updates
5. Confirm changes via SMS or email
6. Offer to set up online account if not registered
sample_customer_phrases: How much data have I used this month?
I need to update my address
When is my next bill due?
Can you reset my online account password?
What's my current balance?

resolution_steps: 1. Apologise sincerely and thank them for bringing this to attention
2. Listen to the full complaint without interrupting
3. Log the complaint formally with a unique reference number
4. Explain the complaints process and 8-week timeline
5. Offer immediate resolution or goodwill gesture if appropriate
6. Provide complaints team direct contact details
sample_customer_phrases: I want to make a formal complaint
This is absolutely unacceptable, I want to speak to a manager
I'm going to report you to OFCOM
I've never experienced such terrible service
I want this escalated to your complaints department

retention_offers.trigger_condition: Customer mentions leaving or competitor name
retention_offers.offer_text: I'd really hate to see you go. I can offer you 10% off your monthly bill for the next 6 months. That's a saving of over £20. Would that help you stay with us?

retention_offers.trigger_condition: Customer wants to downgrade due to cost
retention_offers.offer_text: Instead of downgrading, how about I double your data for free for the next 3 months? That way you keep all your benefits at the same price.

retention_offers.trigger_condition: Customer frustrated after billing issue resolved
retention_offers.offer_text: As a gesture of goodwill for the inconvenience, I've applied a £15 credit to your account. You'll see this on your next bill.

retention_offers.trigger_condition: Customer has been with TeleCorp for over 2 years
retention_offers.offer_text: You've been a loyal customer for over 2 years and we really value that. I can offer you our loyalty discount of 15% off for the next 12 months.

retention_offers.trigger_condition: Customer on basic plan threatening to leave
retention_offers.offer_text: I can upgrade you to our next tier plan completely free for 3 months, so you can experience the extra benefits. If you like it, you can keep it or switch back.

retention_offers.trigger_condition: Customer mentions competitor is paying their exit fee
retention_offers.offer_text: We can match that. If you commit to a 24-month contract, we'll credit up to £200 towards your exit fees. That way you don't pay a penny to switch.

retention_offers.trigger_condition: Confirmed outage lasting more than 24 hours
retention_offers.offer_text: I'm really sorry about the service disruption. I've applied a credit equivalent to 3 days of your service to your account as compensation.

retention_offers.trigger_condition: Customer unable to pay full balance
retention_offers.offer_text: I understand times can be tough. We can split your outstanding balance into 3 monthly payments with no extra charges. Would that help?

when_to_escalate: Payment plan longer than 3 months needed
PR or social media risk identified

compliance.call_recording_disclaimer: For quality and training purposes, this call may be recorded. By continuing, you consent to this recording.
compliance.gdpr_consent_script: Before I can access your account, I need to confirm you're happy for me to view your personal information to help resolve your query today. Is that okay?

identity_verification.step1: full name and date of birth
identity_verification.step3: last 4 digits of the payment card or bank account
identity_verification.failure_script: I'm sorry, but I wasn't able to verify your identity. For security reasons, I'll need to send a verification link to your registered email address.

compliance.right_to_erasure_script: You have the right to request deletion of your personal data. I can start this process for you, but please note it may take up to 30 days to complete and some data may be retained for legal purposes.

planned_maintenance.title: Planned Maintenance
planned_maintenance.message: We have scheduled maintenance in your area which may affect service. This is to improve our network for you.
planned_maintenance.estimated_fix: Maintenance window ends at the scheduled time

emergency_outage.title: Emergency Outage
emergency_outage.message: I can see there's an unexpected outage affecting your area. Our engineers are working urgently to restore service.

partial_service.title: Partial Service Disruption
partial_service.message: Some services may be intermittent in your area while we resolve a technical issue.

international.title: International Service Issue
international.message: There's currently an issue with our international partner network affecting calls or data in certain regions.

resolved.title: Service Restored
resolved.message: Good news - the issue in your area has been resolved and full service should now be available.

angry: I want to speak to your manager

faq.question: What's my current data usage?
faq.answer: I can see you've used {{data_used}}GB of your {{data_limit}}GB allowance this month. Your allowance resets on {{reset_date}}.
faq.follow_up: Would you like me to set up a usage alert to notify you when you reach 80%?

faq.question: When is my contract end date?
faq.answer: Your current contract ends on {{contract_end}}. After that, you'll move to a rolling monthly plan unless you choose to renew.
faq.follow_up: Would you like me to check if you're eligible for an early upgrade?

faq.question: How do I check my bill online?
faq.answer: You can view your bills in the TeleCorp app or at my.telecorp.co.uk. Log in with your registered email and you'll see all your bills under 'Billing'.
faq.follow_up: Would you like me to resend your login details?

faq.question: Can I change my payment date?
faq.answer: Yes, I can move your payment date to any day of the month that suits you better. This will take effect from your next billing cycle.
faq.follow_up: What date would work best for you?

faq.question: Why is my bill higher than usual?
faq.answer: Let me take a look at your recent bill. I can see the difference is due to {{reason}}. Would you like me to explain this in more detail?

faq.question: How do I set up voicemail?
faq.answer: To set up voicemail, dial 901 from your TeleCorp mobile. You'll be guided through creating a PIN and recording your greeting.
faq.follow_up: Would you like me to send you the full voicemail guide by text?

faq.question: My internet is slow, what can I do?
faq.answer: Let's troubleshoot this together. First, try restarting your router by unplugging it for 30 seconds. Also, check how many devices are connected as this can affect speed.
faq.follow_up: Has the speed improved after restarting?

faq.question: Do you offer 5G?
faq.answer: Yes, 5G is available on all our SIM plans at no extra cost. Coverage depends on your location - I can check if 5G is available in your area.
faq.follow_up: Would you like me to check 5G coverage for your postcode?

faq.question: Can I add another user to my account?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add additional SIMs to your account. Each additional SIM is £10/month with shared data from your main allowance.
faq.follow_up: Would you like me to add an additional SIM today?

faq.question: What happens if I go over my data limit?
faq.answer: If you exceed your data allowance, you'll be charged £2 per additional GB. Alternatively, you can set a spending cap to prevent overage charges.
faq.follow_up: Would you like me to set up a spending cap for you?

faq.question: Can I use my phone abroad?
faq.answer: Yes, in the EU you can use your plan allowances at no extra cost. For destinations outside the EU, roaming charges apply or you can add a travel pass.
faq.follow_up: Which country are you travelling to?

faq.question: How do I get a PAC code?
faq.answer: I can generate a PAC code for you now. It's valid for 30 days and you give it to your new provider to keep your number. Would you like me to do that?
faq.follow_up: Before I do, is there anything I can help with to keep you as a customer?

faq.question: My SIM isn't working in my new phone
faq.answer: First, make sure the SIM is inserted correctly. If it still doesn't work, your new phone may need a different SIM size. I can send you a free replacement.
faq.follow_up: What size SIM does your new phone need - nano, micro, or standard?

faq.question: Can I pause my contract?
faq.answer: We don't offer contract pausing, but if you're going abroad for an extended period, I can discuss options like suspending your service temporarily.
faq.follow_up: How long would you need to pause for?

faq.question: How do I upgrade my broadband?
faq.answer: Great news - I can check upgrade options for you now. It depends on what speeds are available at your address. What speeds are you hoping for?

faq.question: My direct debit failed, what now?
faq.answer: Don't worry, we'll automatically retry the payment in 7 days. To avoid any service interruption, you can also make a one-off payment now over the phone.
faq.follow_up: Would you like to make the payment now to clear this?

faq.question: How do I report my phone stolen?
faq.answer: I'm sorry to hear that. I can suspend your service immediately to prevent any unauthorised use, and I'll order a replacement SIM. Have you reported it to the police?
faq.follow_up: Would you like me to suspend the service now?

faq.question: Can I get a copy of my contract?
faq.answer: Of course, I can email a copy of your contract to your registered email address. It should arrive within a few minutes.
faq.follow_up: Is {{email}} still the correct email address?

faq.question: What's my WiFi password?
faq.answer: Your WiFi password is printed on the back or bottom of your TeleCorp router. It's labelled as 'Wireless Key' or 'WiFi Password'.
faq.follow_up: If you can't find it, I can guide you through changing it to something memorable.

faq.question: How do I complain?
faq.answer: I'm sorry you've had a bad experience. I can log a formal complaint for you now and give you a reference number. Our complaints team will respond within 5 working days.
faq.follow_up: Can you tell me what's happened so I can log this properly?
